payload.evidence: Protocol v1 implemented and published from develop as harness-cli-v0.1.14 at d2f89eeabe8d01df95fd19cd6ba981b01a71730f. Release run 29177994849 passed Verify and all five native protocol/snapshot smokes; ten public assets downloaded and checksum-verified. 77 CLI tests, 99 retained Symphony tests, clippy, fail-closed negative fixtures, installer forced-upgrade regression, WAL snapshot, CAS, hierarchy replay, and changeset content identity passed. Owner accepted the published Windows checksum after both rehearsal and publication binaries independently passed native smoke.
